title: 4. **ClawMart Digital Product Seller**
summary:
What it is: A digital product seller that utilizes ClawMart to sell products created using Claude AI and local Ollama LLMs, such as ebooks, templates, and courses.
Revenue model: The seller will earn revenue through sales of digital products on ClawMart, with payments collected through Stripe.
Time to first dollar: 1-2 weeks
First action: Clawmpson can start by creating a digital product using Claude AI and local Ollama LLMs, and setting up a ClawMart store.
